title: Facilities Engineer
description:
Job Description: Engineer – Facilities Maintenance (HVAC)

Role Summary

The Engineer – Facilities Maintenance (HVAC) is responsible for the day-to-day operation, maintenance, and reliability of Heating, Ventilation and Air-Conditioning (HVAC) systems. This role ensures a safe, comfortable, and efficient environment for building occupants while supporting business continuity and compliance with statutory requirements.

Key Responsibilities

  • Operate, monitor, and maintain HVAC systems including chillers, cooling towers, AHUs, FCUs, ventilation systems, and associated equipment.
  • Perform preventive and corrective maintenance to ensure system reliability and minimise downtime.
  • Attend to HVAC-related breakdowns and coordinate repairs with internal teams and external contractors.
  • Monitor system performance via the Building Management System (BMS) and identify abnormalities or improvement opportunities.
  • Ensure compliance with relevant regulatory, safety, and statutory requirements (e.g. BCA, NEA, WSH).
  • Supervise contractors and service providers, ensuring work quality, safety compliance, and adherence to schedules.
  • Support energy efficiency initiatives and recommend measures to optimise system performance and reduce energy consumption.
  • Maintain accurate maintenance records, reports, and documentation.
  • Coordinate with internal stakeholders to address comfort issues and operational needs.
  • Plan, schedule and perform Preventive and Corrective Maintenance work activities on mechanical equipment and system.
  • Provide technical support during audits, inspections, and emergency situations.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Building Services, Facilities Management, or a related discipline.

  • 2–4 years of relevant experience in HVAC or facilities maintenance roles.

  • Working knowledge of HVAC systems and building services operations.

  • Familiarity with local regulations, codes of practice, and workplace safety standards.

  • Able to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.

  • Good communication and coordination skills.

postedCompany.description:
At Alstern Technologies, we don’t just solve engineering challenges—we conquer them. Founded in 2004, we have built a reputation for tackling high-risk, high-complexity projects that others shy away from. From precision engineering solutions to complex construction projects, our expertise is sought after by industry leaders who demand nothing less than excellence.


With a presence in Singapore, Hong Kong, and Myanmar, and strategic partnerships across the Middle East and Asia, we are redefining the industry with cutting-edge technology, sustainability-driven solutions, and an unyielding commitment to quality. We don’t overpromise—we deliver as promised, every time. That’s why at Alstern, we fight the ‘Broken Promise’ culture that plagues the Engineering, Procurement & Construction (EPC) sector.
We are not just another engineering firm. We are the catalyst for change, pushing boundaries and setting new benchmarks in zero carbon footprint engineering.


Our Culture – Precision, Performance & No-Nonsense Execution
At Alstern, we are built on a high-performance, results-driven culture where precision, discipline, and teamwork define success.
 Relentless Excellence: We don’t believe in shortcuts—only top-tier engineering solutions backed by expertise and cutting-edge technology.
 Collaboration Over Individualism: Our teams operate in sync, ensuring seamless execution from blueprint to build.
 Commitment to Delivery: There’s no room for compromise—our reputation is built on meeting and exceeding expectations.
 Safety & Sustainability First: No project is worth more than the well-being of our people and the environment.

We thrive in a structured, performance-driven environment, where clarity of direction, discipline, and results take precedence over ambiguity and debate. If you value a workplace where expectations are clear, excellence is non-negotiable, and results matter more than rhetoric, you’ll fit right in.

Who We’re Looking For  -


As we geared for pivotal growth, we're seeking exceptional individuals to join our journey. Here's what defines you: you see challenges as opportunities for innovation, with an instinct to think beyond traditional boundaries. Flexibility comes second nature to you, enabling you to navigate ambiguity with ease and adapt to rapid change. Calculated risk-taking excites you, not hinders you.  You approach your work with an entrepreneurial spirit, taking ownership and initiative and going above and beyond. Yet you thrive in a collaborative environment, fostering open communication, sharing ideas, and leveraging the collective expertise to achieve common goals.
